description_long: This is a two-story wooden cabin with a broad, overhanging gable roof covered in patterned shingles. The structure features a large, covered balcony running along the front and side, supported by sturdy posts, and a smaller balcony or deck area on the lower level. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, with a mix of natural wood and dark trim accents. Multiple rectangular windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, providing ample natural light, and a single chimney protrudes from the roof. The cabin's design suggests a blend of rustic and alpine influences, suitable for mountain or forested urban neighborhoods. The overall appearance is robust and inviting, with architectural details that emphasize comfort and shelter.
description: A two-story wooden cabin with a wide gable roof, covered balconies, and symmetrically arranged windows, blending rustic and alpine styles.
description_view_0: Front and side view showing the main entrance, large covered balcony, and multiple windows with dark trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the roof overhang and the symmetry of the upper windows.
description_view_2: Rear and side view displaying additional windows and a smaller balcony or deck area.
description_view_3: Top-down view emphasizing the patterned shingle roof and the chimney placement.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with wide overhangs and patterned asphalt shingles, featuring a central chimney
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple rectangular windows symmetrically arranged on both floors, with two pairs on the front facade and additional single windows on the side and rear; all windows are of similar size and shape, creating a balanced appearance.
attribute_door_placement: Single exterior door located on the front facade beneath the main balcony, aligned with the central axis of the building.
